headline: SKYX Platforms Highlights Plug-and-Play Smart Ceiling Tech, Pushes for Mandatory WSCR Code Status
summary: SKYX Platforms (NASDAQ:SKYX) used a recent investor presentation and Q&A session to outline its long-term strategy to make its ceiling-based electrical and smart home technologies a standard for installing lighting fixtures, fans, and other devices more quickly and safely. Company pitch centers
